title: Violet Searches the Palace
description: Pages 1–5 focus on violet searches the palace, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the active characters in this part.
scene: This part follows Violet, Tontatta, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5 as the allies learn about Mansherry's healing power and start searching the palace while the battles continue under the Birdcage.

dialogue.speaker: Violet
dialogue.text: In all my comings and goings from the palace as violet,

dialogue.speaker: Tontatta
dialogue.text: I never heard anything about the Tontatta Princess mansherry being held captive...

dialogue.speaker: Tontatta
dialogue.text: Search for the captured Princess!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Where is she?

dialogue.speaker: Violet
dialogue.text: I haven't peeked into this place in a few years...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: That's crazy... she can look into the palace all the way from here!?

dialogue.speaker: Violet
dialogue.text: Yes...she has clairvoyance*. She can, at will, see across great distances.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Damn, I bet Sanji would give a leg or two to have that power!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Who the hell are you two?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: USOPP! It is I!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Kine- Mon!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: So you know this guy...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Whoa, what's that

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Strangely, pitiful looking creature...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Play Claf

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: That's an "Escape Sparrow." I shall explain more later.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: More importantly, I'm surprised you've already made it up here.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: It appears a truly fearsome contingent of characters are making their way to this plateau!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: That's what I've been trying to say! Everyone and their aunts are trying to get up here!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Announcer
dialogue.text: Well considering how difficult it is to get up here, we've somehow managed to avoid being attacked, but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Worry thyself not, O Tengu*!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: I noticed that everyone was having trouble making their way up here and so I took it upon my- self to place them a net to climb!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: What!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: Soon, they shall all arrive here as well!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: The hell. Did you do that for, idiot?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: King Riku and God usopp are up there!

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: This rope is super hard to climb!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: Huh?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: W- Was such an action un- necessary!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: Those guys are after our heads!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: I've found her!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: You think we're just gonna let you run around finding thi-

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: Wait, what? What did you find?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: Disgraceful! How Disres- Pectful I have been to one to whom I am so indebted!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: I resolve to cut open this belly of mine as re-compense!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: Stop it, Kan- Juro!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: Okay, I've stopped.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: Shut it! You better cut it open!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: What are we gonna do about those guys climbing up here?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: Wait, by the way, just who the hell are you!

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: Forgive me for doing so so so so so so so late, but allow me to introduce my- self as Kanjuro, the Samurai!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: Is that...man- Sherry!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: Rebecca and Robin's side

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: Current location: above level 2

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: Leo? I found her!!!

dialogue.speaker: Tontatta
dialogue.text: Princess mansherry is in the palace!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: Miss Viola! You were looking for her for our sake?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #39
dialogue.text: I'm so glad! Where in the Palace?

dialogue.speaker: Trafalgar Law
dialogue.text: Behind the Chapel ...a small room!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #40
dialogue.text: Do you remember it?

dialogue.speaker: Trafalgar Law
dialogue.text: The timeout room?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #41
dialogue.text: Yes! That's it!!

dialogue.speaker: King Riku
dialogue.text: It reminds me of Miss Scarlet...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #42
dialogue.text: of-of Mother!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #43
dialogue.text: Ahhh...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #44
dialogue.text: When we used to visit the Palace,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #45
dialogue.text: We would often get into mischief with Miss Viola and get scolded by King Riku...

dialogue.speaker: King Riku
dialogue.text: And every time, Miss Scarlet would...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #46
dialogue.text: Oh dear, you got in trouble again? You just don't learn, huh?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #47
dialogue.text: That's not true, Sis! Leo's the one who

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #48
dialogue.text: Broke the plates!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #49
dialogue.text: But miss Viola said I could crush them!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #50
dialogue.text: I said you could touch them!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #51
dialogue.text: I'll come with you guys to apo- logize later, but for now...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #52
dialogue.text: I brought some fruit!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #53
dialogue.text: Aren't you hungry?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #54
dialogue.text: I sure am!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #55
dialogue.text: We all

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #56
dialogue.text: Absolutely loved

dialogue.speaker: King Riku
dialogue.text: Miss Scarlet!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #57
dialogue.text: Ah... I remember the place well. Thank you!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #58
dialogue.text: The Palace is now the enemies' base! Be careful, Leo!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #59
dialogue.text: Roger that! I promise you, I will save the princess!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #60
dialogue.text: Gacha

summary: Violet Searches the Palace develops the chapter's Dressrosa conflict through Violet, Tontatta, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, while preserving the OCR dialogue and keeping unclear speakers readable.
